title: Soul Drain reduces attack dice and modifier while equipped

card.rawText: Atk Dice Rolls: -1. Modifier: -1. Atk Dice Rolls cannot be reduced to 0.

plan.title: Soul Drain reduces attack dice and modifier while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Soul Drain to a primary creature and verify the printed attack dice penalty respects the cannot-reduce-to-zero floor.

notes: Use test_primary_creature with 2 Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier +1 so Soul Drain lowers them to 1 die and +0 modifier.

steps: Player 1 plays Soul Drain and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective attack dice.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack dice reduced by 1 but not to 0
Attack damage reflects one low damage die and Modifier minus one

manualVerification: Confirm Atk Dice Rolls cannot be reduced to 0; damage may still be reduced to 0 by the Modifier penalty.
riskNotes: Uses battle damage as the observable Modifier output.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Soul Drain equipped dice and modifier penalties.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
